changes_made: Changed k8s_rbac_role_binding_least_privilege to k8s_rbac_least_privilege_role_binding for consistency
review_notes: The functions are applicable to Kubernetes as they map to RBAC configurations that enforce least privilege and secure service account tokens. The naming conventions are mostly followed, but one function name was adjusted for consistency with the pattern.
naming_improvements: Ensure consistent ordering of terms in function names for clarity, such as using 'least_privilege' consistently at the start of the description.
title: User Responsibilities
step1_reasoning: The control A.9.3 - User Responsibilities focuses on ensuring that users understand and adhere to security policies, such as least privilege and secure access practices. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to RBAC configurations that enforce least privilege access, prevent unnecessary permissions, and secure service account tokens. These checks ensure that users and service accounts have only the permissions they need, aligning with the principle of least privilege.
